expectations.text: Chạy git diff --name-only HEAD (hoặc tương đương) để kiểm tra file thay đổi trước khi build
expectations.evidence: Agent ran git status and mentions 'git diff --name-only HEAD' after reading build-update.php. However, needed to READ the source script first to know what to do — discovery by file exploration, not prior knowledge.
'php tool/build-update.php' mentioned as the command to run

expectations.text: Báo đường dẫn ZIP tại tool/releases/ trong kết quả
Đề cập path remap: packages/skilldo/ → vendor/skilldo/ trong ZIP
expectations.evidence: Mentions path remap after reading the build script. Took 7 tool calls to discover this vs with_skill 8 calls (similar, but baseline spent calls reading source files)
